specialtiesKey: Boat Surveying & Inspection,Diving & Underwater Services,Marine AC & Climate Control,Marine Plumbing & Sanitation

content.tagline: Keeping Your Vessel Running Season After Season
content.about:
Welcome to Ben's Boatworks, a full-service marine facility based in Annapolis, MD, dedicated to keeping your vessel in peak operating condition year-round. We work with boat owners across South Florida and the surrounding waters, bringing a comprehensive range of specialized marine services right to where you need them. Whether you're docked at a marina or anchored offshore, we're built to handle what your boat needs.

At Ben's Boatworks, we offer a focused set of marine specialties designed to cover the systems that matter most. Our boat surveying and inspection services give you a clear, honest picture of your vessel's condition — whether you're buying, selling, or just staying ahead of problems. Our diving and underwater services handle what's below the waterline, from hull inspections to prop work and beyond. We install, service, and troubleshoot marine AC and climate control systems to keep your cabin comfortable in South Florida's heat. And our marine plumbing and sanitation work keeps your onboard systems clean, functional, and compliant.

We understand that your boat represents a significant investment, and we treat it that way. Our clients range from recreational boaters to serious offshore operators, and we bring the same level of care and attention to every job. Serving a 60-mile radius across South Florida, Ben's Boatworks is committed to reliable, straightforward marine service — no runaround, just solid work done right.
content.seoTitle: Ben's Boatworks | Boat Surveying & Inspection Annapolis, MD
content.seoDescription: Ben's Boatworks offers boat surveying, diving services, marine AC & plumbing across South Florida. Call for reliable marine service today.

serviceDescriptions.Boat Surveying & Inspection: A thorough boat survey covers structural integrity, mechanical systems, safety equipment, and overall vessel condition — giving buyers, sellers, and owners a reliable assessment they can act on. Whether it's a pre-purchase inspection or an insurance survey, having an accurate picture of your boat's condition protects your investment and keeps surprises off the water.
serviceDescriptions.Diving & Underwater Services: Underwater marine services address everything below the waterline without the need to haul out — including hull inspections, propeller checks, zinc replacement, and debris removal. Regular underwater inspections help catch fouling, corrosion, and damage early before they turn into costly repairs.
serviceDescriptions.Marine AC & Climate Control: Marine air conditioning and climate control systems require specialized knowledge of refrigerant handling, raw water cooling circuits, and onboard electrical systems. We service, repair, and install marine AC units to keep your cabin comfortable and your system running efficiently through heavy use.
serviceDescriptions.Marine Plumbing & Sanitation: Marine plumbing and sanitation systems — including holding tanks, through-hulls, head systems, and discharge plumbing — need to be properly installed and maintained to stay functional and meet environmental regulations. We troubleshoot and repair these systems to keep everything flowing correctly and your vessel in compliance.

content.serviceAreaDescription: Ben's Boatworks is based in Annapolis, MD and provides mobile marine services throughout South Florida within a 60-mile radius.
commonProjects: Pre-purchase boat survey and full condition inspection for prospective buyers
Underwater hull inspection and zinc anode replacement without haul-out
Marine AC system repair and refrigerant recharge for cabin comfort
Holding tank and marine head system repair or replacement
Propeller inspection and debris removal via professional dive service
Through-hull fitting inspection and marine plumbing system overhaul
Insurance or documentation survey for vessel valuation and coverage
